title: iris missouriensis var. pelogonus
intro: Iris missouriensis var. pelogonus, also known as the pale purple iris, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Iris missouriensis var. pelogonus include treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
